creator: billf@chimesnet.com
text:
On Wed, Aug 23, 2000 at 12:55:54AM -0700, roman.pavlik@skynet.cz wrote:

> FreeBSD tosha.in.skynet.cz 4.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 4.1-RELEASE #11: Wed Aug  2 08:45:56 CEST 2000     rpav@tosha.in.skynet.cz:/usr/src/sys/compile/TOSHA  i386
> >Description:
> There is a problem with Citrix Clinet for Linux, version 3.00.97 
> (latest avialable) running on FreeBSD 4.x: when "drive mapping" in "options" 
> is enabled, the client core dumped when it try to connect to server.
> There is no problem with this client running on FreeBSD 3.x !!
> 
> >How-To-Repeat:
> Install Citrix Client for Linux on FBSD 4.x box, enbale drive mapping and try to
> connect to Citrix server.

This is a binary client, there isn't much we can to debug it.

-- 
Bill Fumerola - Network Architect, BOFH / Chimes, Inc.
                billf@chimesnet.com / billf@FreeBSD.org
